rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no session biography
Register match — Agents 101 voice trio (Godin × Sutherland × Siilasmaa)
rules_evaluated.evidence: Sutherland reframe leads 'don't open the door' beat; Godin peer-warmth carries body; Siilasmaa held back per mood-arc constraint

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 69-73: STRIDE, least privilege, residual risk, assess-mitigate-reassess-decide loop credited in maintainer notes

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body
rules_evaluated.evidence: Residual, mitigate, scope, filter, gate, review are all earned in body (lines 29-31) before use

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body
rules_evaluated.evidence: No defensive framing; no 'not aspirational/vendor/theoretical' phrases; teaching carries without positioning posture
No unearned tech vocabulary; 'deterministic' taught by example; agent agency modeled correctly
All em-dashes removed post-Pass-3 audit; sentences split or parenthesized per rule

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No time-of-day anchors in body prose
rules_evaluated.evidence: Time-of-day anchor removed; replaced with module-relative phrasing at line 51 ('when the next agent gets built')
Maintainer line 63: 'deepened unease — names the unease as the permanent condition, does not resolve it; Module 5 is the rescue'
Unease is 'I'd like to know and I don't' (epistemic), not shame or guilt; ending does not resolve (line 51-55)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode
rules_evaluated.evidence: Title: 'The discipline of risk' not 'Fabrication'; body teaches *the loop* as the discipline; failure modes (non-determinism, instruction-set attacks, emergent capability) are the context it bounds

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategy-fidelity check — no front-running of downstream teaching moments
rules_evaluated.evidence: Module 4 establishes the loop (assess-mitigate-reassess-decide); Module 5 owns the rescue/resolution arc per maintainer note line 63

summary: PASS. Body prose (lines 1-56) passes all writing, student-facing, and strategy-tie-in compendium checks. Banned words: none. Em-dashes: removed per Pass 3. Time-of-day anchors: removed. Value-prop leak: absent. Register: Agents 101 voice trio deployed correctly (Sutherland leads reframes, Godin carries warmth, Siilasmaa held back per unease-module constraint). Framework credit: STRIDE, least privilege, residual risk, loop structure all credited in maintainer block. Mood contract: deepened unease honoured — ending names unease as permanent, no false resolution. Strategy fidelity: loop teaching in M4 primes M5's rescue arc without spoiling it.
